title: `Context has expired`: While executing URL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1, 'Alice', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), (2, 'Bob', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 day');
CREATE TABLE t2 (value DOUBLE, description VARCHAR);
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t2) FROM t1 WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Executing URL with expired context in query
